title: The Redactionists
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: A metadata analyst at a defense contractor discovers her employer is systematically erasing people from all records—birth certificates, tax IDs, death notices—as if they never existed, and she's next on the list.
long_description: A metadata analyst at a defense contractor discovers her employer is systematically erasing people from all records—birth certificates, tax IDs, death notices—as if they never existed, and she's next on the list.
